workbookPath.description: Path to a mikuproject workbook JSON file passed to the upstream CLI as --in.

phaseUid.description: Phase task UID passed to the upstream CLI as --phase-uid.

mode.description: Optional phase-detail mode passed to the upstream CLI as --mode.

rootTaskUid.description: Optional scoped root task UID passed to the upstream CLI as --root-task-uid.

maxDepth.description: Optional non-negative scoped depth passed to the upstream CLI as --max-depth.

outputPath.description: Optional path for the generated phase_detail_view projection.
